title: EssentiallyOptimal
description: Makes game run smoother and more enjoyable. Supports any shader compatible with Immersive Portals.
body:
![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98012646f2ef3e3b885317e694fbbc38b599252c_0.webp)
![Won't support Quilt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2befab2cc6623d28d50cd880587cf99852872d1.png)
![Won't support Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cea356d61e234b930ddcfdf451154c4f990e4598.png)

(Credit to wsrv.nl for the images above.)

![Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34089bf1cf241db05f1b22886357e0b5b3e201b1.png)

EssentiallyOptimal adds many mods I reccomend, like Sodium and Essential Mod. This mod is for people who are tired of vanilla or experience too much lag, and want something new and smooth, which this Modpack has!

![Technical](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d1d2792198a9dbbbb34215d3472815e62635f2c.png)

Iris shaders ONLY. Do not update Iris or Sodium- doing so will cause the game to crash. If you insist on updating Iris or Sodium, please remove Immersive Portals.

Fabric ONLY- no NeoForge, Quilt, or straightup Forge.

![Legal and revenue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c5c8c3285616a892ee0f1cdffa59ea13dbc632f.png)

EssentiallyOptimal is liscenced under the MIT Liscense, which can be reviewed [here.](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MIT_License#:~:text=year%3E%20%3Ccopyright%20holders%3E-,Permission%20is%20hereby%20granted%2C%20free%20of%20charge%2C%20to%20any%20person%20obtaining,THE%20SOFTWARE%20OR%20THE%20USE%20OR%20OTHER%20DEALINGS%20IN%20THE%20SOFTWARE.,-Variations%5Bedit)

If you wish to support me, you do not have to donate, just Downloading will help.
